results.title: Image-guided Adaptive Radiotherapy for Bladder Cancer.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 33972024. 2021/06/01 00:00. Purpose: In this 
review article, I provide a comprehensive up-to-date perspective on this issue, 
particularly in terms of practical recommendations regarding the defi nition of 
target volumes, the use of diff erent types of uterovaginal applicators, 
intraoperative complications, and potential manifestations of late 
gastrointestinal, genitourinary, and vaginal toxicity.

DOI: 10.48095/ccko202396
PMID: 37072243 [Indexed for MEDLINE]


4. Cancer Radiother
